case_title: DANIEL W STEWART VS. JOHN DOE et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-06-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-04-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-06-2010 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-04-2010 CONTINUED TO DEC-06-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEWART, DANIEL W AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-13-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-29-2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUL-06-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-04-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-13-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DANIEL W STEWART, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-04-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-19-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance or objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, the court orders that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Continued To Dec-06-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/6/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
